{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Perfected infiltration
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Perfected infiltration]] is a technique used by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
